entry_market_snapshot.execution_note: User caught improved under-side price at -126 after stale board showed under at -155. One-cent exception over preferred -125 cap was accepted, but late scoring exceeded required suppression threshold.

game_flow_summary.summary: Golden State built a dominant lead behind efficient shooting, perimeter volume, assist creation, and turnover conversion. Connecticut remained inefficient overall, but the game still produced 53 points after entry, enough to push final total to 167 and beat the 161.5 under. The under thesis was structurally aligned with CON offensive collapse, but blowout suppression failed because late scoring, free throws, bench production, and Connecticut catch-up possessions exceeded expectation.

postmortem_phases.phase_1_game_flow: Golden State led wire-to-wire with no lead changes or ties. The Valkyries converted Connecticut mistakes into 24 points off turnovers and built a lead as large as 34. However, the expected late-game pace suppression did not hold strongly enough; the final segment produced 53 points after the live under entry.
phase_2_pivotal_moments: Entry came at CON 44 - GSV 70 with 1:52 left in Q3 and 114 total points scored.
The under needed fewer than 48 additional points; the game produced 53 after entry.
Connecticut remained inefficient but still reached 70 through free throws, bench scoring, and late possessions.
Golden State continued scoring despite blowout context, finishing with 97 points, 13 made threes, 24 assists, and 18 second-chance points.
The model over-weighted blowout suppression and under-weighted late bench/FT scoring risk.

phase_4_model_relevance_summary.model_alignment: Mixed. The model correctly identified Connecticut offensive weakness but incorrectly assumed that the blowout state would suppress scoring enough. Entry required holding final 11:52 to 47 or fewer points; the game produced 53. The under-side unlock rule must be tightened for blowouts where the favorite still has efficient bench scoring and the trailing team is accumulating free throws.
future_adjustments: Remove automatic one-cent price-cap exception unless late scoring requirement has at least a 6-point cushion beyond projection.
Downgrade live unders when trailing team already has 15+ FTA before late 3Q.
Downgrade live unders when favorite has 10+ made threes and 20+ assists before 4Q.
Add LATE_BLOWOUT_TOTAL_LEAKAGE gate when final segment needs fewer than 48 points and both teams have foul/bench scoring paths.
